judge_thought:

- Game 1: 10 points (under 20)
- Game 2: 16 points (under 20)
- Game 3: 10 points (under 20)
- Game 4: 22 points (at least 20)

The first time the team scored at least 20 points was in Game 4 (22–13 vs. Minnesota Swarm), so it took 4 games.
